title: Depreciation
summary: 9609 A Level — straight-line depreciation and net book value.

simpleExplanation.title: Spreading asset cost
simpleExplanation.summary: Depreciation allocates the cost of non-current assets over their useful life, matching expense to revenue earned.
steps: Asset shown at NBV on SOFP.

sections.content: **Depreciation** (10.1.4) — show **formula and double-entry effect** in answers.
